dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7089 IH: Protecting America’s Resources from Kings Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Amo (for himself, Ms. Velázquez, Ms. Sewell, Mr. Cohen, Ms. Norton, Ms. Lofgren, Mr. Goldman of New York, and Mr. Huffman) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Natural Resources

form.official-title: To prohibit National Park System entrance fee waivers commemorating the birthday of a sitting President, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Protecting America’s Resources from Kings Act or the PARK Act.

section.header: No entrance fee waiver for certain Presidential birthdays
section.text: For each unit of the National Park System or National Wildlife Refuge System at which an entrance fee is charged under section 803(e)(1) of the Federal Lands Recreation Enhancement Act (16 U.S.C. 6802(e)(1)), the entrance fee may not be waived or otherwise reduced to commemorate the birthday of a sitting President, unless the birthday coincides with a Federal holiday listed in section 6103 of title 5, United States Code.
